title: Mildly Sweet Croatian Berries Bake
description: A traditional Croatian dessert featuring frozen mixed berries, baked on a cedar plank in a wood-fired oven, with anti-inflammatory properties. This dish is perfect for a weeknight dessert.
instructions: Preheat the wood-fired oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the thawed frozen mixed berries, honey, lemon juice, and vanilla extract.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the almond flour, coconut oil, salt, turmeric, and ginger powder.
Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and mix until well combined.
Place the mixture on a cedar plank, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Bake the mixture in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until the edges are lightly golden brown.
Remove the bake from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes.
Serve warm, garnished with fresh berries if desired.
